title: Spinach and Cheese Omelette
description: A simple and delicious omelette filled with spinach and cheese, perfect for a quick breakfast.
instructions: Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together with a pinch of salt and pepper.
Heat the butter in a small non-stick pan over medium heat.
Once the butter has melted, add the spinach and cook until wilted.
Pour the whisked eggs over the spinach and cook until the eggs start to set.
Sprinkle the shredded cheese over the eggs and use a spatula to gently fold the omelette in half.
Cook for another minute until the cheese is melted and the eggs are cooked through.
Slide the omelette out of the pan onto a plate and serve hot.
